steps.title: Identify what needs to be illustrated
steps.content: The claim is that the house is “remote and solitary.” This requires visual evidence of isolation—a landscape where nothing else is visible.

steps.title: Find the quote showing isolation
steps.content:
Choice D depicts exactly this: “nothing but the great gray prairie on every side” and “not a tree nor a house”—showing barrenness and isolation.

Choices A and B are about Oz, not Kansas; choice C names residents but shows no isolation.

That matches choice D—D is correct.
